svg.title: Function signatures and parameters
svg.desc: Complete list of all functions with inputs, outputs, and file locations

g.text: Output: string (full song lyrics) via Groq API
Output: string (YouTube description, tags, etc.) via Groq API
Output: string (art prompt for image generation) via Groq API
Output: {imagePath, status} - writes PNG to outputs/images/
Output: Promise that resolves to outputPath - uses FFmpeg
Input: songData object {title, genre, mood, lyrics}
Output: {audioPath, status} - creates dummy MP3 file
Output: inserts record into SQLite database/music.db
